auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Loyverse personal access token sent as Authorization: Bearer <token>. Create one in Loyverse Back Office integrations at https://r.loyverse.com/dashboard/#/integrations/tokens.

actions.name: get_category
actions.description: Get one Loyverse category by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Loyverse resource.

category.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

actions.name: get_customer
actions.description: Get one Loyverse customer by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Loyverse resource.

customer.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

actions.name: get_item
actions.description: Get one Loyverse item by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Loyverse resource.

item.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

actions.name: get_merchant
actions.description: Get merchant profile information for the connected Loyverse account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

merchant.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

actions.name: get_receipt
actions.description: Get one Loyverse receipt by receipt number.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Loyverse receipt.

receipt.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

actions.name: get_store
actions.description: Get one Loyverse store by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Loyverse resource.

store.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

actions.name: list_categories
actions.description: List item categories in the connected Loyverse account.

ids.description: Limit results to these Loyverse category IDs.

createdAtMin.description: Only include resources created at or after this timestamp.

createdAtMax.description: Only include resources created at or before this timestamp.

updatedAtMin.description: Only include resources updated at or after this timestamp.

updatedAtMax.description: Only include resources updated at or before this timestamp.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Loyverse allows up to 250.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous Loyverse list call.

showDeleted.description: Whether to include soft-deleted Loyverse records.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Loyverse categories.

items.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

categories.description: The Loyverse categories returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass to the next list request, or null when there is no next page.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List customers in the connected Loyverse account.

ids.description: Limit results to these Loyverse customer IDs.

createdAtMin.description: Only include resources created at or after this timestamp.

createdAtMax.description: Only include resources created at or before this timestamp.

updatedAtMin.description: Only include resources updated at or after this timestamp.

updatedAtMax.description: Only include resources updated at or before this timestamp.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Loyverse allows up to 250.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous Loyverse list call.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Loyverse customers.

items.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

customers.description: The Loyverse customers returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass to the next list request, or null when there is no next page.

actions.name: list_items
actions.description: List items in the connected Loyverse account.

ids.description: Limit results to these Loyverse item IDs.

createdAtMin.description: Only include resources created at or after this timestamp.

createdAtMax.description: Only include resources created at or before this timestamp.

updatedAtMin.description: Only include resources updated at or after this timestamp.

updatedAtMax.description: Only include resources updated at or before this timestamp.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Loyverse allows up to 250.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous Loyverse list call.

showDeleted.description: Whether to include soft-deleted Loyverse records.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Loyverse items.

items.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.
The Loyverse items returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass to the next list request, or null when there is no next page.

actions.name: list_receipts
actions.description: List receipts in the connected Loyverse account.

receiptNumbers.description: Receipt numbers used to filter Loyverse receipt results.

sinceReceiptNumber.description: Show receipts after the receipt with this number.

beforeReceiptNumber.description: Show receipts before the receipt with this number.

storeId.description: Filter receipts to one Loyverse store ID.

order.description: Filter receipts by Loyverse order value.

createdAtMin.description: Only include resources created at or after this timestamp.

createdAtMax.description: Only include resources created at or before this timestamp.

updatedAtMin.description: Only include resources updated at or after this timestamp.

updatedAtMax.description: Only include resources updated at or before this timestamp.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Loyverse allows up to 250.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous Loyverse list call.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Loyverse receipts.

items.description: A Loyverse API object returned without reshaping.

receipts.description: The Loyverse receipts returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass to the next list request, or null when there is no next page.
